category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a general-purpose CLI for the Mender backend; official GitHub README describes it as a standalone tool for Mender server management APIs.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses “Mender CLI”; source_facts.name is mender-cli.
docs_sources: Official Mender docs include a setup section for mender-cli in the APIs guide and workstation tool downloads; official repository README documents configuration and autocomplete.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/mendersoftware/mender-cli, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README describes interaction with Mender server management APIs and CI/backend integration; official docs describe mender-cli as a standalone CLI tool; source_facts.executables lists mender-cli.
